entries.title: Workspace UI — Mock-Derived API Spec (Stale)
verified_against: no /api/v1 routes exist in internal/server or cmd
types derived from autoflow_platform.experimental.tsx mock (e.g. Lead.last='2g', agent='Agent_01')
entries.notes: Moved under workspace-ui/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Reviewed in PR24F. Self-describes as derived from an experimental TSX mock. The documented base URL /api/v1 is NOT implemented in the current backend (no /api/v1 routes) and the mock-shaped types do not match the real API. Stale early contract; do not use as source of truth without rewrite.

entries.title: Workspace UI — Component Contracts (Draft)
entries.notes: Moved under workspace-ui/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Reviewed in PR24F. Post-refactor component prop contracts for the autoflow UI primitives; the components/ui module exists, but the doc derives from the same experimental mock as api-spec and is not test-pinned or verified binding against current props. Kept draft as component-contract guidance.

entries.title: Workspace UI — Known Issues (Mock-Era Audit)
verified_against: all KI-* target autoflow_platform.experimental.tsx (2026-04-27) which is ABSENT from the repo
entries.notes: Moved under workspace-ui/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Reviewed in PR24H. Bug/tech-debt list (KI-001..) audited against autoflow_platform.experimental.tsx (2026-04-27), a mock file no longer present in the repo; the production frontend has moved to frontend/src/modules/autoflow. Targets are obsolete -> archived.

entries.title: Workspace UI — LeadsView Decomposition Plan
entries.notes: Moved under workspace-ui/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Reviewed in PR24F. Self-labelled 'PLAN (not yet implemented)' refactor-only split of the LeadsView god view, which is still ~999 lines and on the file-size allowlist. Future-facing -> draft. Tied to active lead-lifecycle-work-queue (PR-4 LifecycleTabs already extracted).

entries.title: Workspace UI — SaaS UX Hardening Track
verified_against: self-labelled DESIGN APPROVED (2026-06-12); PRs not yet shipped per project tracking
entries.notes: Moved under workspace-ui/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Reviewed in PR24H. Design-approved authoritative UX/RBAC/extension-version-gating plan; the PRs (incl. the cookie-leak fix) are not yet shipped. Future-facing approved plan -> draft.
